language.label: Language
language.footer: You can change your language anytime in Settings.

history.title: Bet History
history.empty: No spins yet — spin the reels to build your history.

messages.insufficient: Insufficient balance — top up to keep playing.
messages.autoStopLowBal: Autoplay stopped — top up to keep playing.
messages.buyInsufficient: Insufficient balance to buy free spins.

howto.title: HOW TO PLAY
howto.lead: Safari Fortunes is a 5×4, 25-payline slot. Match symbols from the leftmost reel along a payline to win.
howto.objectiveBody: Land 3 or more matching animals on one of the 25 paylines (left to right). Each win pays the symbol’s value × your bet, and every winning line is highlighted on the reels.
howto.betting2: Your bet is the total stake per spin, played across all 25 lines.
howto.betting3: Bigger bets scale every payout, jackpot contribution and the buy price.
howto.wildBody: The WILD medallion substitutes for any animal to complete a winning line. It cannot replace the Scatter or Bonus symbols.
howto.scatter1: Land 3+ Scatter symbols anywhere to win a scatter pays and trigger 10 Free Spins.
howto.scatter2: Free spins cost no balance and every win pays double (×2).
howto.scatter3: More scatters during the round re-trigger extra spins.
howto.scatter4: Impatient? Buy Free Spins starts a round instantly for the shown price.
howto.jackpotsBody: Four jackpots grow as everyone plays and can drop at random — the amount is paid straight to your balance.
howto.bonusBody: Collect 3 Bonus symbols (tracked on the Safari Bonus panel) to spin the prize wheel and win a cash prize (up to 50× your bet) or extra free spins.
howto.turbo1: Turbo speeds up the reel spin and win animations.
howto.turbo2: Auto spins automatically (10 / 25 / 50 / ∞) and stops on a big win, low balance, or when you tap it again.
howto.note: Play for fun and bet responsibly. All outcomes are random.
